'''Timothy Truman''' (born [[February 9]], [[1950s#1956|1956]]) is a comic author who wrote several of the early arcs in [[Dark Horse Comics]]' ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' series.

==Star Wars bibliography==
===[[Star Wars: Republic|Republic]]===
*[[Star Wars (1998) 7|''Star Wars'' (1998) 7]] ([[1999]])
*[[Star Wars (1998) 8|''Star Wars'' (1998) 8]] ([[1999]])

*[[Star Wars (1998) 11|''Star Wars'' (1998) 11]] ([[1999]])
*[[Star Wars (1998) 12|''Star Wars'' (1998) 12]] ([[1999]])
*[[Star Wars (1998) 13|''Star Wars'' (1998) 13]] ([[1999]])
